title: polyscias scopoliae
intro: Polyscias scopoliae, also known as the Scopolia plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the tropical forests of the Pacific Islands. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation, fever, and pain. The plant's extracts are used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis, coughs, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, Polyscias scopoliae is typically used in the form of tinctures, teas, or infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
